title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.465 - Funds to be deposited in general revenue
text:
197.465.  Funds to be deposited in general revenue. — All funds received by the department under the provisions of sections 197.400 to 197.475 shall be deposited in the state treasury to the credit of general revenue.
(L. 1983 H.B. 51 § 13)
